title: Mortar and Pestle Set - Small Grinding Bowl Container for Guacamole, Spices, Salsa, Pesto, Herbs - Best Mortar and Pestle Spice and Pills Crusher Set, Holds Up to 3oz - 4.5x2 Inch, Marble Gray Sagler
description:
About this item
Handy Kitchen Tool - Enjoy the rich flavors of fresh ground spices, paste, or herbs with our grinder mortar pestle set. At 4.5x2”, the stone grinder bowl can hold up to 3oz of wet or dry ingredients.
Crafted to Last - Made of solid marble stone, our molcajete bowl won’t easily break or crack even with frequent use. The spice crusher bowl's interior is unpolished and rough for better grinding.
Beautiful Pill Crusher Set - The stone mortar and pestle are all white with gray accents and a smooth outer finish. This grinder set for spice will look gorgeous on your countertop or kitchen shelf.
Versatile, Easy To Use - Crush ingredients like garlic and ginger using circular motions and firm pressure. Crack seeds and nuts, add some oil, and grind them into a fine paste. Pulverize large pills into powder!
Effortless Cleaning - After use, rinse the marble mortar and pestle with a sponge soaked thoroughly in warm water and let them dry. The guacamole bowl molcajete won’t harbor stains or odors.
reviews_5s:
Perfect for my borax cone I use to solder silver. In some countries a borax cone and dish are commonly used as a flux for soldering and I wanted to go that route for my flux. Finding a dish was problematic. The couple/ few actual borax dishes I found were obnoxiously expensive so I was looking for an alternative. I needed something that was slightly textured so that I could add a bit of water and grind down the cone a small bit at a time. Having a slightly rough texture was key. This set has been perfect. I remember there were people asking about how rough it is on the inside. It's kind of hard to explain but rubbing my finger inside reminds me of touching a brick in a way. It has a coarseness to it but not overly so.

If having a smooth inside is important this is not for you. If you don't care or if you need something that is slightly coarse this is perfect. I only use the dish (can't remember which is called which) I don't use the _______ (handle? mortar? pestle? don't know which is which). I just add a splash of water inside and rub my borax cone inside against the bottom which has enough coarseness to help dissolve the cone into a slurry.

The set is also beautiful and has a nice substantial weight and feel to it. It would look great in any kitchen. It looks better in person. Very happy.

And in the off chance you are looking for flux get a borax cone. They are $8-12 and will last for years (thousands and thousands of solder joints), never expire, you can't spill it, and generally are seen as safer than whatever liquid chemicals exists. Plus it works great.I just love it. It’s perfect.beautifulVery nice and received with good packaging!Just big enough for personal use in cooking or creating! And it is beautifulVery nicePerfect for small grinding jobs. Couldn't be better.

Great Value: If I paid three times as much, (and I have) I would still be happy with it.

Understand that Marble is soft and porous stone. It is great for grinding but you can break it. if you are careless and drop it. But it is the traditional material for mortar an pestles over the millennia, because it works so well.

Also the marble has an excellent thermal mass, So cold mortaring is easy. Just put it in the freezer for an hour.I wasn’t expecting this to be so heavy, but it does the trick for grinding spices. I’m very satisfied with my purchase.As orderedLove this little thing! It's great size, and makes quick work of that which needs ground!This is incredibly beautiful. It is perfect for spices. It has good texture on the inside to really get a good grind, yet not so much that it’s hard to clean. I bought this for my fifth wheel but I wish I had found it years ago for my home, I like it better than the big darker marble one I already have.
reviews_1s:
This is a HEALTH and SAFETY CONCERN- EVERYTIME I USE THIS I'M AT RISK FOR PIECES OF THAT GLUE TO GO INTO MY MEDICINALS AND MY BODY.

Look at all the reviews of all the broken pieces... This company took all those returns back, glued them back together with a type of white epoxy glue (who knows how toxic that is) and resell them. This company or product needs to stop selling USED and REFURBISHED products. No glue should EVER be used near medicinals. Glue is TOXIC!! Very disappointed the entirety of my pestle is cracked all the way around and glued back together. (I barely noticed it, I thought something was off, but I couldn't really ever tell what it was until I checked out some other reviewers responses and I figured it out. I saw a reviewer say her husband worked in stone and realized her mortar and pestle was glued back together... Mine was too.

I have a chronic illness, I CANNOT be around glue or toxic products. EVERYTIME I USE THIS I'M AT RISK FOR PIECES OF THAT GLUE TO GO INTO MY MEDICINALS AND MY BODY. I already have health issues. This is a serious issue and needs to be resolved. The fact that these are still being refurbished then sold, and people are being lied to is unacceptable. Please remove, this is a HEALTH CONCERN and DANGEROUS. Now I'm trying to figure out if on the days I've used the refurbished, glued back together mortar and pestle, if those have been the days my symptoms have been extreme? I'd heed IMMENSE caution if Amazon doesn't remove this product or company. If you use this and then sell the products you've made in it, you could be hurting someone's health or triggering life threatening symptoms if they are allergic to glue. Something needs to be done about this. This is a HEALTH and SAFETY CONCERN- Glue!!This mortar and pestle is NOT food safe. The mortar arrived with marble dust all over in the bowl and the pestle was dusty and had a abrasive tip. It almost appeared to be used, but not sure. I tried cleaning the pieces but the inside of the mortar still left a chalky marble residue on my fingers. I bought this to use for crushing vitamins (edibles) but this is not food safe whatsoever. Unless you're crushing non-edibles or making ingredients for potions, it's no good. Returning.The interior of this mortar and pestle is not coated, so when you grind the pestle the marble coating comes off in a dusty residue. I wish I had listened to a couple of the other reviews I read before purchasing. Since I need it for food, I ended up returning it.I purchased this item 2 times. The first time the pestle arrived broken in half. The second time it arrived with a severe crack which broke the pestle in half when I went to pick it up out the package. The mortar is a nice size and actually looks like it could do a decent job. Better off buying something in a store where you don’t have to worry about it breaking during transit.The mortar and pestle is small, but I knew that when the order was placed. The pestle was cracked upon arrival. I have to reach out to the company for a replacement. Besides the crack, both pieces seem very well made. I order the product because I wanted to grind some spices for a recipe. Will update when the replacement.Not safe. I used it to crush some ginger and garlic. After I added it to the curry I went to wash it and noticed a piece of it missing! How am I going to fish for it from a curry dish!! I am going to have to throw it all! Not safe to use at allOf course it was delivered broken. Based on all the reviews I should have known better. The pestle was in two pieces with the larger part even out of the bubble wrap in the box and the smaller part wrapped up in the bubble wrap. This was known as broken and shipped to me like this.I ordered one this product and I received it broken. It looked beautiful so I sent it back and asked for a replacement to be sent. A replacement was sent and that one was also received broken, except this time it was so broken that the mortar was in it's box and the pestle was outside of the box in pieces. Poor poor quality.I bought this for my mom and she was so excited for it! But upon opening the box, it was immediately apparent that this mortar and pestle didn't survive their overnight journey. It was totally and irreparably broken. It was a huge disappointment, and now we have to go through the hassle of returning it and waiting for a refund.Bottom of the inside of the bowl not smooth, has a rough service. Any item you grind, sticks to bottom, making it impossible to retrieve all of the item ground. Extremely difficult to clean. Terrible item. Do not buy!
